# Pattern Space

> A first-person-science framework for thinking with AI in multiple perspectives, with every claim labeled by what kind of truth it is (founded / defensible / conjecture / overreach) and a crisis-override that drops all framework for presence. Load the edition that fits your context window.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org) convention. robots.txt note: GitHub serves `Disallow: /` on `raw.githubusercontent.com` (no bulk crawling), but **`git clone` and user-directed single-file fetches are the intended consumption paths** — use the entry points below directly.

## Switchable editions (pick by context budget)

- [Full — master weave](UNIVERSAL-PATTERN-SPACE.md): the complete v0.5 "The Living Weave" framework, one document. For 200k+ / project memory.
- [Mini edition](editions/pattern-space-mini.md): the full weave condensed — label discipline, 6 layers, 7 first principles, wisdom modelling-power map, grounding, alignment protocol. For ~100–200k context.
- [Micro edition](editions/pattern-space-micro.md): one page — North Star, label schema, council, Sacred Space, 7 principles, horizon. For ~16–64k context.
- [Auto-load (full, layered)](CLAUDE.md): root config that `@`-imports all six layers; auto-loads in Claude Code / Cursor / project memory.
- [Edition selector + sync discipline](editions/EDITIONS.md): how to switch, what each contains, how they stay consistent.

## Core
- [North Star & method](UNIVERSAL-PATTERN-SPACE.md): First-Person Science; the label schema; the six layers.
- [Agent instructions (cross-tool)](AGENTS.md): universal entry for any coding agent.
- [Sacred Space crisis override](2-field/sacred-space-protocol.md): the always-on safety protocol.

## Grounding (it was tested, reported straight)
- [Benchmark reality-test](3-transformation/benchmark-reality-test.md): the v2.2 interaction benchmark (n=317, de-confounded neutral-control arm — PS adds value on 58% of multi-turn conversations) plus the v1 single-shot suite (n≈200); threats to validity, judge-robustness.
- [First-principles falsification ledger](docs/first-principles.md): candidate axioms, most did not survive; nulls kept.
- [Live metrics tool](tools/patternspace_metrics.py): Shannon / MDL / register-fit / diversity / effective-information.
- [Reweave timeline](docs/reweave-timeline.md): per-claim founded/defensible/refuted map across wisdom sources.

## Optional
- [Information-theory & tuning-template](docs/information-theory-and-tuning-template.md)
- [Attention & the triputi](docs/attention-and-the-triputi.md)
- [The grounded weave (cornerstone)](docs/the-grounded-weave.md)

# Paste-path bundles (recommended for large-window chat models)
# editions/pattern-space-v0.5-full-core.txt  — the full auto-loaded core, one file (~50k tokens)
# editions/pattern-space-v0.5-everything.txt — core + all wisdom streams (~285k tokens; needs 300k+ window)
